test_description: Verify VPC CIDR block non-overlap and Subnet tagging for AWS Load Balancer Controller auto-discovery.
business_risk: Network collision with peered networks; Inability for EKS to provision Load Balancers.
preconditions: Terraform apply completed for VPC module.
test_steps: 1. Query AWS VPC API for the created VPC CIDR. 2. Verify CIDR against blocked ranges. 3. Query Public and Private subnets. 4. Check for 'kubernetes.io/role/elb' tags on public subnets and 'kubernetes.io/role/internal-elb' on private subnets.
expected_result: VPC CIDR is 10.0.0.0/16 (or configured value). Public subnets have '1' for elb tag; Private subnets have '1' for internal-elb tag.

test_description: Verify EKS Control Plane Logging and API Server Endpoint Access Restrictions.
business_risk: Security auditing gaps; Unauthorized access to K8s API.
test_steps: 1. Query EKS Cluster configuration via AWS CLI. 2. Assert 'logging.clusterLogging.enabledTypes' includes 'api', 'audit', 'authenticator', 'controllerManager', 'scheduler'. 3. Attempt to access API Server endpoint from a public IP (if configured private-only) or verify CIDR allowlist.
expected_result: All logging types enabled. Public access restricted to VPN/Bastion CIDR or disabled entirely.

test_description: Verify pgvector extension installation and vector operations.
preconditions: RDS Instance running, Security Groups allow access.
test_steps: 1. Connect to PostgreSQL using psql or a client. 2. Run 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;'. 3. Create a test table with a vector column. 4. Insert a test vector. 5. Perform a simple cosine distance query.
expected_result: Extension exists; Insert succeeds; Query returns calculated distance.

test_description: Verify JWT Strategy validation logic for valid and expired tokens.
preconditions: NestJS AuthGuard configured. Mock Cognito JWKS.
test_steps: 1. Generate a valid mock JWT signed with private key matching mock JWKS. 2. Send request to protected endpoint. 3. Generate expired JWT. 4. Send request to protected endpoint.
expected_result: Valid token returns 200 OK. Expired token returns 401 Unauthorized.

test_description: Verify Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) enforcement for different user groups.
preconditions: User accounts created for SystemAdmin and VendorContact groups.
test_steps: 1. Authenticate as VendorContact. 2. Attempt to access /admin/users endpoint. 3. Authenticate as SystemAdmin. 4. Attempt to access /admin/users endpoint.
expected_result: VendorContact receives 403 Forbidden. SystemAdmin receives 200 OK or 201 Created.

test_description: Validate input DTOs for Client creation (Class-Validator).
business_risk: Data corruption; XSS injection via fields.
test_steps: 1. Send POST /clients with missing 'name' field. 2. Send POST /clients with invalid email format in 'contactEmail'. 3. Send POST with valid payload.
expected_result: Case 1: 400 Bad Request (name should not be empty). Case 2: 400 Bad Request (email must be an email). Case 3: 201 Created.
success_criteria: Invalid data never reaches controller logic.

test_description: Verify presigned URL generation enforces file type and size limits.
test_steps: 1. Request upload URL for 'test.exe' (invalid type). 2. Request upload URL for 'test.pdf' (valid type). 3. Request URL for file size > 10MB.
expected_result: Step 1: 400 Bad Request (Invalid file type). Step 2: 200 OK with URL. Step 3: 400 Bad Request (Size limit exceeded).

test_description: Verify redaction of diverse PII patterns using regex/NLP mock.
test_steps: 1. Input text containing email, SSN, phone number, and credit card formats. 2. Run sanitization function. 3. Inspect output text.
expected_result: All identified PII entities replaced with [REDACTED] or specific placeholders. No false positives on non-PII technical terms.

test_description: Verify resilience against LLM API failures (Rate Limiting/Downtime).
preconditions: Worker service running; Mock OpenAI server or interception configured.
test_steps: 1. Submit document for processing. 2. Simulate HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) from LLM provider. 3. Verify exponential backoff retry. 4. Simulate HTTP 500. 5. Verify Dead Letter Queue routing after max retries.
expected_result: System retries with backoff. Eventually routes to DLQ without crashing worker.

test_description: Load test vector similarity search with scaled dataset.
business_risk: Slow user experience; Timeout during matching.
preconditions: DB seeded with 10,000 vendor profiles and embeddings.
test_steps: 1. Generate random project embedding. 2. Execute search API call requesting top 10 matches. 3. Measure latency. 4. Run 50 concurrent requests.
expected_result: p95 latency < 250ms under load. Results are consistent.

test_description: Verify Stripe Payment Intent creation with correct metadata.
preconditions: Stripe Test Mode API Keys configured.
test_steps: 1. Create Invoice in system. 2. Call endpoint to create Payment Intent. 3. Verify response contains 'client_secret'. 4. Query Stripe API to verify metadata (InvoiceID, ProjectID) matches.
expected_result: Payment Intent created in Stripe with correct amount, currency, and metadata.

test_description: Verify signature verification and idempotency of webhook processing.
business_risk: Spoofed payments; Double counting of revenue.
test_steps: 1. Send payload with invalid signature -> Expect 400/401. 2. Send valid 'payment_intent.succeeded' payload -> Expect 200 and Ledger Update. 3. Send SAME payload again -> Expect 200 but NO Ledger Update (Idempotent check).
expected_result: Security check passes; Replay attack handled gracefully without data corruption.

test_description: Verify audit log ingestion into OpenSearch.
business_risk: Compliance failure; Loss of audit trail.
test_steps: 1. Trigger sensitive action (e.g., User Login). 2. Wait for async processing. 3. Query OpenSearch index for user ID and action type.
expected_result: Log entry exists in OpenSearch with correct timestamp and metadata.

test_description: Verify email dispatch via SES mock.
test_steps: 1. Trigger 'Project Created' event. 2. Notification service consumes event. 3. Verify SES SendEmail API called with correct To/Subject/Body.

test_description: Verify full login flow including MFA challenge.
test_steps: 1. Navigate to Login. 2. Enter User/Pass. 3. Verify redirection to MFA page. 4. Enter valid MFA code. 5. Verify redirection to Dashboard.
expected_result: User lands on Dashboard with valid session.

test_description: Verify SOW upload, status polling, and data review UI.
test_steps: 1. Navigate to Project. 2. Upload SOW PDF. 3. Verify status changes 'Processing' -> 'Ready'. 4. Click Review. 5. Verify extracted fields are editable. 6. Save changes.
expected_result: File uploads; Status updates automatically; Form saves correctly.
